name: Anis ibn Maaqil
title: Brave of Asbah
shortDescription: A brave Shia who went to the battlefield on Ashura reciting epic poetry and sacrificed his life for the Imam.
fullStory:
Anis ibn Ma'qil al-Asbahi was a brave and loyal Shia from Kufa. Holding the love of the Ahl al-Bayt (AS) in his heart, he reached Karbala to assist the Master of Martyrs (AS).

On the noon of Ashura, Anis stepped onto the battlefield with firm faith. He recited epic poetry manfully, reproaching Umar Sa'd's army.

In his Rajaz, Anis said: 'I am Anis ibn Ma'qil, and my sword will descend upon your heads...' After a visible fight and striking down a number of enemies, he became the target of arrows and spears.

Anis ibn Ma'qil proved his loyalty by sacrificing his blood and joined the caravan of Karbala martyrs. His name is mentioned in Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى أَنِيسِ بْنِ مَعْقِلِ الأَصْبَحِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Anis ibn Ma'qil al-Asbahi...
